summary.description: What happened this step — concise explanation of reasoning and outcome

worker_prompt.description: Focused prompt for worker subagent (only when action=dispatch_worker)

worker_result_summary.description: Summary of what the worker accomplished (after dispatch completes)

verification_commands.description: Shell commands the supervisor should run to verify this phase

file_checks.description: File paths that should exist after this phase

files_touched.description: Files created or modified in this step

retryable.description: Whether a failure is retryable (transient) or permanent

error.description: Error description (only when action=fail or retry_phase)

report.description: Final completion report content (only when action=finalize)
